metric_value: MaXLine products quietly announced September 9 2002; market development campaign initiated thereafter

metric_value: Fundamental program element is to define a new market segment in the storage hierarchy between disk and tape — 'active archiving' or 'rapid/instant archiving'

metric_value: Maxtor wants to avoid cannibalizing its existing higher-margin SCSI disk drive product families when offering lower-priced ATA drives
notes: Primary strategic constraint — additive not substitutive to SCSI TAM

metric_value: Maxtor wants to blunt efforts of competitors with different technology portfolios and competing market development agendas
notes: Competitive moat rationale for category creation

metric_value: Minimum 75 interviews across wide variety of vertical markets and enterprise sizes including face-to-face interviews
